availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Masterplast Heel Balm for softer, more comfortable feet. Fragrance free, ready to use, apply to hydrate and moisturise dry, cracked skin.
INTENSE MOISTURE: Extra strength, deep penetrating formula to provide moisture and comfort. Use regularly to maintain skin quality and soft heels
READY TO USE: Ensure feet are clean and dry before use. Massage into dry hard skin twice daily and continue treatment until the skin is smooth and repaired
PREVENTION: Use the cream to maintain skin texture, prevent the skin from hardening, cracking and causing discomfort
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 70g tube
description: Product Description Masterplast Heel Balm for softer, more comfortable feet. Fragrance free, ready to use, apply to hydrate and moisturise dry, cracked skin. Extra strength, deep penetrating formula to provide moisture and comfort. Use regularly to maintain skin quality and soft heels. Ensure feet are clean and dry before use. Massage into dry hard skin twice daily and continue treatment until the skin is smooth and repaired. Ready to use 70g tube. Safety Warning For external use ony Legal Disclaimer Use only as directed on the packet. See more
